series_metadata.series_description: Documents in either paper or digital format that the STABLE department provides and shares with the public and stakeholders. This may include, but are not limited to: (1) Brochures; (2) Presentations; (3) Graphics; (4) Program Forms; (5) STABLE Card materials; and (6) Other outreach materials.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: remainder of fiscal year that documents were provided, following fiscal year
